2. Explore

content.text: Hey! I'll spin up several agents in parallel to test them all out. This will be a good stress test — let's see who's alive and kicking! 🐰

input.prompt: Just a quick health check — tell me your name, your role, and list the tools you have available. This is a test to verify the agent system is working.

content.text:
I'm Claude, an AI assistant built by Anthropic. I'm currently running as Claude Code, the official CLI for Claude, acting as an agent in a multi-agent system.

My available tools are:

- **Bash** - Execute shell commands
- **CronCreate** - Schedule recurring or one-time prompts
- **CronDelete** - Cancel a scheduled cron job
- **CronList** - List all scheduled cron jobs
- **Edit** - Perform exact string replacements in files
- **EnterWorktree** - Create an isolated git worktree
- **ExitWorktree** - Leave a worktree session
- **Glob** - Fast file pattern matching
- **Grep** - Powerful content search across files
- **NotebookEdit** - Edit Jupyter notebook cells
- **Read** - Read files from the local filesystem
- **RemoteTrigger** - Call the claude.ai remote-trigger API
- **SendMessage** - Send messages to other agents in the team
- **Skill** - Execute a skill (slash command)
- **TaskCreate** - Create structured task lists
- **TaskGet** - Retrieve a task by ID
- **TaskList** - List all tasks in the task list
- **TaskUpdate** - Update task status, ownership, dependencies
- **TeamCreate** - Create a team for coordinating multiple agents
- **TeamDelete** - Remove team and task directories
- **WebFetch** - Fetch and process web content
- **WebSearch** - Search the web
- **Write** - Write files to the local filesystem

I'm connected and operational. The agent system is working.

input.prompt: Quick health check — tell me your name, role, and what tools you have available. This is a test to verify the agent system is working.

content.text:
I'm Claude Code (or Claude), an AI assistant, though in this context I'm operating as a Read & Plan specialist with tool access. 

**Role:** Read & Plan - I'm designed to analyze the existing codebase, understand the architecture, and design implementation plans without making any actual changes to files.

**Available Tools:**
- **Read** - Read file contents
- **Grep** - Search file contents
- **Glob** - Find files by pattern
- **Bash** - Run shell commands (read-only operations only)
- **WebFetch** - Fetch content from a URL
- **WebSearch** - Search the web
- **SendMessage** - Communicate with other agents
- **TaskCreate/TaskGet/TaskList/TaskUpdate** - Manage task lists
- **TeamCreate/TeamDelete** - Create and manage teams
- **CronCreate/CronDelete/CronList** - Schedule tasks
- **Skill** - Execute specialized skills
- **RemoteTrigger** - Call claude.ai remote-trigger API

I'm operating in read-only mode, meaning I can explore, analyze, and plan, but I cannot create, edit, or delete any files.

I'm fully operational, and the agent system is working.

content.text:
Here's the full health report:

## Agent System Status

| Agent | Status | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| **general-purpose** | ✅ Working | All tools available |
| **Explore** | ❌ 402 Error | Out of credits |
| **Plan** | ✅ Working | Read-only mode, all tools available |
| **claude-code-guide** | ❌ 402 Error | Out of credits |
| **code-simplifier** | ❌ 402 Error | Out of credits |
| **Luca** (Backend Node.js) | ✅ Working | All tools available |
| **Ellie** (Frontend UI/UX) | ✅ Working | All tools available |

**4 out of 7 agents are working properly.** The 3 failures (`Explore`, `claude-code-guide`, `code-simplifier`) are all hitting **402 credit errors** from OpenRouter — your API key has run out of credits. The remaining ones that succeeded managed to squeeze through before the balance was fully depleted.

To fix: head to https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys and top up or create a new key with a higher limit. Once that's done, all agents should work again.
